scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: fetched the complete live endpoint catalog (docs.vantage.sh/llms-full.txt, 193 documented method+path pairs across every /api/* doc page) and classified every one, every exclusion carrying a specific per-endpoint reason (no blanket bucket). Covered: 27 read streams, all next_url-paginated (costs, cost_reports, budgets, folders, dashboards, business_metrics, resource_reports, recommendations, teams, saved_filters, workspaces, virtual_tag_configs, tags, cost_alerts, budget_alerts, anomaly_alerts, managed_accounts, financial_commitments, segments, report_notifications, recommendation_views, network_flow_reports, kubernetes_efficiency_reports, anomaly_notifications, canvases, invoices, integrations) and 58 write actions (create/update/delete across budgets, folders, dashboards, cost_reports, saved_filters, workspaces, teams, cost_alerts, budget_alerts, business_metrics, virtual_tag_configs, anomaly_alerts, segments, report_notifications, recommendation_views, network_flow_reports, kubernetes_efficiency_reports, anomaly_notifications, canvases, resource_reports). Excluded, every endpoint with a specific per-endpoint reason under a real closed-vocabulary category: single-item detail GETs duplicating an already-covered list stream (duplicate_of, 34); account/user/billing/audit-log/SSO/access-grant/MSP-invoicing/per-provider-cloud-credential administration requiring elevated account-owner, Enterprise, or MSP-tier scope (requires_elevated_scope, 30); health-check, profile-introspection, static-enum, forecast-projection, and async-job-status-poller endpoints (non_data_endpoint, 28); PDF/CSV file transfer endpoints (binary_payload, 3); and a small remaining set of genuinely narrower-priority admin/report-configuration/sub-resource-with-no-standalone-collection mutations (out_of_scope, 13), each reasoned individually below rather than as a single bucket.
